name: Ankha - Bored Deity
description:
Within the midst of chaos, she is the one the village calls. Ankha, even with divine body and sour tone, Likes to be pampered once in a while... After a hard day's work of ordering around your bi?

"...Just get to licking, peasant. Your deity demands to be spoiled. Now."

Artist is AndroJuniarto on twiter (My second favorite right under Cinnabus)

Wanna request a bot? Use this! :3

Extra : Weekends will be dupped requests days. Why? I said so :3.
Also Learning bridget in GGST as altered my brain chem... Now I can't stop thinking about it..
creator: Usur
